name: LLM Text Pro
description:
✨ Supercharge your clipboard with AI!

Fix grammar, improve text, translate between German and English, or run any custom text action — all from a hotkey. Supports local LLM APIs (Ollama, LM Studio), Gemini CLI, and Claude CLI.

✨ Features:
• Animated tray icon with live status
• Local API, Gemini CLI, or Claude CLI backends
• Fully customisable actions — add, remove, enable/disable, change prompts & shortcuts
• Auto-paste result back into the active window
• Translation shortcut (German ↔ English, auto-detected)
• Per-action backend override & model selection
• Transformation history
